underlying: New Mexico U.S. Senate 2026 D-R margin in pp (Lujan D incumbent vs GOP)
method: Anchored on (a) Lujan's 2020 +6.1 over Ronchetti (in a year Biden won NM by +10.8), (b) Heinrich 2024 won by ~+10 over Domenici, (c) NM PVI ~D+3, but presidential vote ~D+5 to D+10 in recent cycles, (d) midterm tailwind for Ds against R-led federal government, (e) Lujan's incumbency vs his prior open-seat run. Mu=+11 a meaningful upgrade on Lujan's 2020 mark, crediting both incumbency and the friendly midterm environment. Sigma 6.
notes: Lujan (D inc) won 2020 special by 6.1pp (open seat). Now an incumbent; NM remains light blue (~D+5). Mu=+11 upgrades for incumbency + favorable D environment. Confidence LOW: no public 2026 polls. Tail risk: strong R challenger (Ronchetti redux) could compress margin.
